label: New — The Library
items: A new mobile Quick Access tile that lets you look up any plant by name across Perenual, Verdantly, and Rhozly AI — without first adding it to your Shed.

Tap a result to open a full preview with four tabs: Care Guide (sunlight, watering, edibility, toxicity, gallery), Grow Guide (the 9-section AI guide), Companions (beneficial / harmful neighbours), and Light (optimal lux range).
Each preview has a Save button that adds the plant to your Shed in one tap. If it's already there, the button reads "In your Shed" and is disabled — no duplicates.
A Saved tab on The Library screen shows the plants currently in your Shed, filterable by name. Tap any of them to open the same preview view.
Generated data (grow guides, companion suggestions) is persisted to the catalogue — so the next person to look up the same plant gets an instant cached read instead of waiting for AI.
